sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Float64, description String, created_at DateTime);

INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description, created_at) VALUES (1, -1.0, 'Negative exponential', now()), (2, 0.0, 'Zero exponential', now()), (3, 1.0, 'Positive exponential', now()), (4, NULL, 'NULL value', now());
CREATE TABLE join_table (join_id UInt32, join_value Float64);
INSERT INTO join_table (join_id, join_value) VALUES (1, exp(1.0)), (2, exp(-1.5));
SELECT t.id, round(exp(t.value), 4) AS exp_value FROM test_table t WHERE exp(t.value) >= (SELECT avg(join_value) FROM join_table) AND t.created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
SELECT t.id, round(exp(t.value), 4) AS exp_value FROM test_table t JOIN join_table j ON t.id >= j.join_id WHERE j.join_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.id, exp_value HAVING exp_value >= 0.1;
SELECT t.id, exp(t.value) AS exp_value FROM test_table t WHERE exp(t.value) >= 0 AND (t.value IS NOT NULL OR t.description IS NULL);
SELECT t.id, j.join_value, exp(t.value) FROM test_table t JOIN join_table j ON round(exp(t.value), 4) >= j.join_value ORDER BY j.join_value;
SELECT SUM(exp(value)) AS total_exp FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING total_exp >= (SELECT MIN(join_value) FROM join_table);
